gist.headline: PollenQuill joins the garden
gist.blurb: The community greenhouse just got a little more literary. PollenQuill has officially been added to our app showcase!
gist.summary: Added the community-built PollenQuill app to the official apps directory and greenhouse.
gist.impact: Users can now discover PollenQuill and explore its core features directly from the community showcase.
gist.visual_concept: The name 'PollenQuill' evokes writing, journaling, and feather pens. The visual should feature Polly the bee acting as a writer or interacting with a magical quill pen, symbolizing the new app.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny writer's beret, holding a glowing feather quill pen and writing in a chunky digital journal. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
